title: opt_pushselect stuck with multi-table UDF
poc: CREATE TABLE ss (id INT, s CLOB);
SELECT * FROM tokenize( (SELECT id, s FROM ss) );
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (user_id INT PRIMARY KEY, username VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, bio CLOB);
INSERT INTO users VALUES (1, 'alice', 'Loves programming and databases.');
INSERT INTO users VALUES (2, 'bob', 'Enjoys hiking and outdoor activities.');
SELECT * FROM tokenize((SELECT user_id, bio FROM users));
SELECT * FROM tokenize((SELECT user_id, bio FROM users)) WHERE length(token) > 10;
